creator: destination_wellknown
caption:
More things to do in Edinburgh 👇

Edinburgh is honestly one of the top European cities for a weekend getaway: it’s quite small and walkable, it’s absolutely gorgeous no matter where you look, and the locals are super friendly 🏴󠁧󠁢󠁳󠁣󠁴󠁿

Here are some more cool things to do in Edinburgh:

1. Climb Arthur’s Seat
2. Go to Portobello Beach on a nice sunny day 3. Day trip to the Pentland Hills 4. Go out to the Shore in Leith and have a pint at Malt & Hops 5. Royal Botanic Gardens  6. Blackford Hill for the best view of Edinburgh (apart from Calton Hill) 7. National Museum of Scotland 8. St Giles’ Cathedral 9. Real Mary King’s Close
10. Eat at the Sheep Heid Inn (one of the oldest pubs in Scotland)
11. The Castle (obviously)

Have you been to Edinburgh? Let me know what you thought about the wee Scottish capital 🤠🏴󠁧󠁢󠁳󠁣󠁴󠁿  #edinburgh #lovegreatbritain #scotlandtravel #traveltips

transcription.text: Don't visit Edinburgh without doing these five things. Dean Village is one of the most charming areas of Edinburgh and Dean Village is always peaceful unlike some parts of the city that can feel pretty crowded with tourists. Calton Hill is where you'll find the best 360 view of Edinburgh without having to do a proper hike and I recommend going up there on your first day in Edinburgh to get a good feel and understanding of the layout of the city. Victoria Street in the Old Town of Edinburgh is one of the most beautiful streets in town and it's what actually inspired J.K. Rowling when she invented Diagon Alley for the Harry Potter universe. Stockbridge is an area of Edinburgh only 15 minutes from the city centre but it's got a totally different and more local feel compared to the normal places that tourists visit. So head down to the Bailey Bar for a drink among the locals and then head over to Scranton Scully for some excellent food. Circus Lane right around the corner from the Bailey Bar is one of the most charming little streets in Edinburgh so if you want that perfect Edinburgh photo or video then this is the spot.
